name: pluxx
description: Build once, ship installable plugins to Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Build once, ship installable plugins to Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode
interface.longDescription: Use Pluxx inside Codex to import MCPs or migrate existing plugins, validate and refine the scaffold, then generate installable plugins for Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode from one maintained source project.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluxx to import or migrate this plugin into a maintained project and validate the result.
Use Pluxx to refine this scaffold safely, then rerun validation.
Use Pluxx to build installable plugins for Claude, Cursor, Codex, and OpenCode, then install the target I want to test.
